nodes.name: 蓝肩裸鼻雀
nodes.summary: 蓝肩裸鼻雀（Azure-shouldered tanager，学名 Thraupis cyanoptera），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约
nodes.summary: 路易·皮埃尔·维埃约是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联90种鸟类，包括草黃樹鴨、环颈鸭、赤琵嘴鴨等90种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 聖卡塔琳娜島
nodes.summary: 聖卡塔琳娜島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝肩裸鼻雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 馬爾山脈
nodes.summary: 馬爾山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括蓝肩裸鼻雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The azure-shouldered tanager (Thraupis cyanoptera) is a species of bird in the tanager family, Thraupidae

links.evidence: It inhabits humid montane forests, open woodlands, secondary growth, and forest edges and can be found at elevations of up to , but usually stays below

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The azure-shouldered tanager prefers forested habitats more than other Thraupis tanagers and inhabits humid montane forests, open woodlands, secondary growth, and forest edges. On Santa Catarina Island, it has also been recorded from orchards. It is mainly found on the Atlantic slopes of Serra do Mar

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits humid montane forests, open woodlands, secondary growth, and forest edges and can be found at elevations of up to , but usually stays below

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is mainly a species of humid forest and is less adept at utilizing secondary forest and forest edges than other species in its genus, which has contributed to a large decline in its range. Historically, the lowland forests this species inhabits were threatened by deforestation caused by agriculture, mining, and plantations
